function.name: web_search
function.description: Search the web for real-time data, current events, or external documentation not in training.

function.name: read_file
function.description: Read and return the full text content of a local file for inspection, analysis, or debugging.

path.description: Relative or absolute path to the file.

function.name: list_dir
function.description: List all files and folders in a directory to explore project structure or verify file existence.

path.description: Directory path to list. Use '.' for current directory.
